/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_acorn.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_acorn.dir/test_acorn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_acorn.dir/rabitq_side_index_acorn.cpp.o -o test_acorn  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sunyahui/ljk/FilterVector/FilterVectorCode/ACORN/build_local/faiss ../faiss/libfaiss.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/12/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
